headline: Will Norfolk Southern (NSC) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: 4 Transportation Stocks Positioned to Beat Q2 Earnings Expectations
